purpose: Returns control to the previous screen by setting up the COMMAREA and XCTLing to the program specified in CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM.
Processes the ENTER key by validating input data, setting up working storage variables, reading the authorization record, and populating authorization details.
Sends the authorization view screen to the user, optionally erasing the screen first based on the SEND-ERASE-FLG flag.
Receives the authorization view screen input from the user into the input map COPAU1AI.
Processes the ENTER key by validating input data, setting up working storage variables, reading the authorization record, and populating authorization details.
Sends the authorization view screen to the user, optionally erasing the screen based on the SEND-ERASE-FLG flag.
Returns control to the previous program by XCTL with updated COMMAREA fields indicating the calling context.
Marks the selected authorization as fraud or removes fraud status by updating the record and linking to the fraud processing program.
Sends the authorization view screen to the user, optionally erasing the screen based on the SEND-ERASE-FLG flag.
Processes the PF8 key to navigate to the next authorization record for the account, updating screen data or displaying a message if at the end.
Sends the authorization view screen to the user, optionally erasing the screen first based on the SEND-ERASE-FLG.
Processes the ENTER key by validating input data, setting up authorization key and account ID, and reading the corresponding authorization record.
Sends the authorization view screen to the user, optionally erasing the screen first based on the SEND-ERASE-FLG.
Reads the authorization summary and detail records from IMS using the account ID and authorization key, setting appropriate flags based on the result.
Commits the current unit of work by issuing a CICS SYNCPOINT to ensure data integrity.
Populates the authorization details screen fields using data from the PAUTDTL1 segment and working storage, including formatting dates, amounts, and decline reasons.
Reads the authorization summary and detail records from the IMS database using the account ID and authorization key set in working storage.
Updates the authorization detail record in IMS with fraud status changes and performs a syncpoint or rollback based on success.
Executes a CICS rollback to undo database changes and ends the transaction abnormally.
Executes a CICS rollback to undo database changes and ends the transaction abnormally.
Populates screen fields and working storage with authorization details from the current PA segment, including date, time, amount, response code, fraud status, and merchant information for display.
Reads the authorization summary and detail records for a specific account and authorization key from IMS, setting EOF flag if not found.
Retrieves the next authorization detail record in sequence from IMS and updates the EOF status accordingly.
Issues a CICS SYNCPOINT to commit the current unit of work to ensure data consistency.
Populates screen output fields with formatted authorization data from the current PA segment for display after reading the next record.
Populates the header information on the screen by moving current date, time, titles, transaction ID, and program name to the output map.
Schedules the IMS PSB and handles errors by setting the error flag and displaying a message if scheduling fails.
Sends the authorization view screen with error messages and clears or sets cursor based on erase flag when an IMS read error occurs.
Sends the authorization view screen with error messages and clears or sets cursor based on erase flag when an IMS read error occurs during detail record retrieval.
Sends the authorization view screen with error messages and clears or sets cursor based on erase flag when an error occurs while reading the next authorization record.
Commits the current transaction to ensure data integrity after successfully updating the authorization details.
Rolls back the current transaction due to an error during the authorization update process.
Sends the authorization view screen with an error message and cursor handling based on the erase flag.
Displays the authorization view screen with an error message when PSB scheduling fails.
